title: senecio grisebachii var. balansae
intro: Senecio grisebachii var. balansae, commonly known as Balansa's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Balansa's ragwort is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
